sample_values: Schema definition with column names, data types, descriptions, and cached value distributions for the NYC DOT Bus Lanes dataset

Brochure describing 34th Street Busway regulations, maps, and frequently asked questions
Column definitions for the MTA ACE (Automated Camera Enforcement) Routes dataset
Descriptive page about Select Bus Service features including bus lanes, fare collection, station design, and transit priority treatments
Index page listing NYC Select Bus Service routes with descriptions, launch dates, ridership figures, and service improvements
Informational brochure about the Jamaica Ave and Archer Ave Busway pilot projects starting October 2021
Informational brochure describing the 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority Pilot Project regulations, FAQ, and access instructions for eastbound and westbound travel.

field_proposals.rationale: Standard MIME types with synonym merge (html -> text/html).
Heterogeneous date formats, only 5 occurrences; better as free text.
Mixed month-year and season strings; free text preferred.
Small set of distinct document categories.
ISO timestamp, single value repeated; not an enum.
Single value 'Bus Lanes' with only one accepted occurrence.
Mixed date formats, only two distinct values.
Two distinct report type labels, normalised to snake_case.
Two observed source categories, suitable as open enum.

key_dispositions.rationale: Single observation, too sparse to promote.
Structured date object useful for queries.
Core descriptive text with good coverage.
Original document date in free-text form.
Free-text document type with diverse values.
Only one occurrence, structured but too sparse.
Free-text audience/recipient description with multiple observations.
Entity name of publisher, high coverage, contextual.
Numeric record count, useful when present.
Source identifier string, useful for de-duplication.
Full title of the source document.
Observed distinct categories: webpage, data_dictionary, brochure, evaluation_report, etc.
Primary title of the source, high coverage.
Numeric year of source, useful for temporal filtering.

proposal.notes: Many sparse keys kept as needs_more_data; publisher is relation_context; normalized date objects promoted as structured fields; source_type promoted to open enum based on observed sample values.
